### Web Socket Stage

Logical ID: `WebSocketStage`

用途推定: Web Socket Stage (AWS::ApiGatewayV2::Stage)

| 設定項目 | 値 |
| --- | --- |
| `AccessLogSettings` | {"DestinationArn":{"Fn::GetAtt":["WebSocketAccessLogGroupEE932001","Arn"]},"Format":"{\"requestId\":\"$context.requestId\",\"eventType\":\"$context.eventType\",\"routeKey\":\"$context.routeKey\",\"status\":\"$context.status\",\"connectionId\":\"$context.connectionId\"}"} |
